TNT.Sports.3.HD.uk.title: Live FIA World Endurance Championship
TNT.Sports.3.HD.uk.subtitle: 24 Hours of Le Mans-Race
TNT.Sports.3.HD.uk.description: Coverage from the 24 Hours of Le Mans, as the third round of the season takes place at Circuit de la Sarthe in Le Mans, France. This prestigious race, first held in 1923, is the oldest endurance event in the world, and is one of three races in the 'triple crown' alongside the Formula 1 Monaco Grand Prix and the Indycar Indianapolis 500. Legendary British driver Graham Hill is the only driver to complete the triple crown, while Fernando Alonso only needs to win the Indianapolis 500 to add his name to history.

ABC.National.Feed.us2.title: What Would You Do?
ABC.National.Feed.us2.description: Using hidden cameras, host John Quiñones observes and comments on how ordinary people behave when they are confronted with dilemmas that require them either to take action or to walk by and mind their own business. Various scenarios are created that force people to make split-second -- and often surprising -- decisions, and variations of the situation (such as changing the genders, races or clothing of the people involved) are often featured to see if different reactions are elicited. Examples of situations on the show include a waitress being harassed by her boss, and a drunken valet trying to park cars.

Kimmel's family and friends take part in the festivities, including his Cousin Sal, Uncle Frank (until his death in 2011) and childhood friend Cleto Escobedo III, who leads the show's house band. Recurring segments include the FCC-pleasing This Week in Unnecessary Censorship in which they take TV clips and "bleep and blur things whether they need it or not," as Kimmel describes it. But it's too bad they consistently run out of time for Matt Damon's segment.

HBO.East.us2.description: Settled in with the Brown family, Paddington the bear is a popular member of the community who spreads joy and marmalade wherever he goes. One fine day, he spots a pop-up book in an antique shop -- the perfect present for his beloved aunt's 100th birthday. When a thief steals the prized book, Paddington embarks on an epic quest to unmask the culprit before Aunt Lucy's big celebration.

HBO.East.us2.title: Dead of Winter

HBO.East.us2.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
HBO.East.us2.description: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

HBO.East.us2.title: Joker
HBO.East.us2.description: Forever alone in a crowd, failed comedian Arthur Fleck seeks connection as he walks the streets of Gotham City. Arthur wears two masks -- the one he paints for his day job as a clown, and the guise he projects in a futile attempt to feel like he's part of the world around him. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

HBO.East.us2.title: They Will Kill You
HBO.East.us2.description: A woman answers a cryptic ad for a housekeeping job at a luxurious yet foreboding New York City high-rise. Upon arrival, she discovers residents have vanished without a trace for decades, fueling whispers of a satanic cult lurking in the shadows.

HBO.East.us2.title: Midsommar

Traveling to Earth, they threaten the planet with destruction at the same time that Superman decides to renounce his superpowers in order to live a normal life as Clark Kent with his new love, Lois Lane (Margot Kidder).

She leans on her friends (Zoe Lister-Jones, Hamish Linklater) for support but, after a series of romantic humiliations, professional blunders and boozy antics, Lola realizes that she alone is in charge of her fate.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Eric Noone begins a forbidden romance with Rose Davenport, the lady of the house at a posh English manor. When an unexpected murder occurs, Eric gets framed, leaving Rose and her family's future uncertain.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Beetlejuice Beetlejuice
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Still haunted by Beetlejuice, Lydia's life gets turned upside down when her daughter discovers a portal to the afterlife. When someone says Beetlejuice's name three times, the mischievous demon returns to unleash his very own brand of mayhem.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Wedding Crashers
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Jeremy (Vince Vaughn) and John (Owen Wilson) are divorce mediators who spend their free time crashing wedding receptions. For the irrepressible duo, there are few better ways to drink for free and bed vulnerable women. So when Secretary of the Treasury William Cleary (Christopher Walken) announces the wedding of his daughter, the pair make it their mission to crash the high-profile event. But their game hits a bump in the road when John locks eyes with bridesmaid Claire (Rachel McAdams).

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Freaky Tales
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: An NBA star, a corrupt cop, a female rap duo, teenage punks, neo-Nazis and a debt collector embark on a collision course in 1987 Oakland, Calif.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Lola Versus
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Just three weeks before her wedding, Lola (Greta Gerwig) finds herself suddenly without a partner when her longtime fiancé, Luke (Joel Kinnaman), dumps her. With her 30th birthday looming and being forced to re-enter the New York City dating scene, she feels adrift in a cold world. She leans on her friends (Zoe Lister-Jones, Hamish Linklater) for support but, after a series of romantic humiliations, professional blunders and boozy antics, Lola realizes that she alone is in charge of her fate.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Get Him to the Greek
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: An ambitious executive at a record company, Aaron Green (Jonah Hill) gets what looks like an easy assignment: He must escort British rock legend Aldous Snow (Russell Brand) to L.A.'s Greek Theatre for the first stop on a lucrative comeback-concert tour. Snow, however, has different plans. Learning his true love is in California, the rocker vows to win her back before starting the tour, forcing Aaron to pull out all the stops to get Snow on stage in time.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Suicide Squad
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Figuring they're all expendable, a U.S. intelligence officer decides to assemble a team of dangerous, incarcerated supervillains for a top-secret mission. Now armed with government weapons, Deadshot, Harley Quinn, Captain Boomerang, Killer Croc and other despicable inmates must learn to work together. Dubbed Task Force X, the criminals unite to battle a mysterious and powerful entity, while the diabolical Joker launches an evil agenda of his own.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: House Party
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Aspiring club promoters and best buddies Damon and Kevin are barely keeping things together. Out of money, down on their luck and about to lose the roofs over their heads, they need a huge windfall to make their problems go away. They soon decide to host the party of the year at an exclusive mansion, which just happens to belong to none other than NBA superstar LeBron James. What could go wrong?

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: I Love You Forever
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Color Theories by Julio Torres
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In his second HBO comedy special, Peabody-winner Julio Torres presents a helpful guide to understanding the world through his playful interpretations of colors.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Brett Goldstein: The Second Best Night of Your Life
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Brett Goldstein, a comedian, writer, actor and swimmer, begins his next big adventure.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Caleb Hearon: Model Comedian
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Caleb Hearon's first stand-up comedy special at Chicago's Constellation; it features him dissecting life's absurdities with charm and wit before a packed house.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Atsuko Okatsuka: The Intruder
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The comic-actor dishes on the futile art of impressing teenagers, attending a "Magic Mike Live" show with her grandmother, and the alarming reactions that she and her husband had to the unwanted presence of an intruder.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The LEGO NINJAGO Movie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The battle for NINJAGO City calls to action young Master Builder Lloyd, aka the Green Ninja, along with his friends, also secret ninja warriors. Led by Master Wu, as wise-cracking as he is wise, they must defeat the evil warlord Garmadon, who also happens to be Lloyd's dad. Pitting father against son, the epic showdown tests these fierce but undisciplined modern-day ninjas as they learn to check their egos and pull together to unleash the inner power of Spinjitzu.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: The Long Haul
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Young Greg Heffley is looking forward to a long summer of just hanging out, but his mother throws a monkey wrench into his plans when she forces the entire family to take a road trip for a relative's birthday celebration. His eyes soon light up after he realizes that the excursion is his ticket to a gaming convention to meet YouTube sensation Mac Digby. Greg's imagination then kicks into overdrive as he sneakily hatches a scheme to attend the expo and gain some much-deserved fame.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Diary of a Wimpy Kid: Dog Days
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: It's summer, and Greg Heffley (Zachary Gordon) is looking forward to playing video games and spending time with his friends. However, Greg's dad (Steve Zahn) has other plans: He's decided that some father-son bonding time is in order. Desperate to prevent his dad from ruining summer vacation, Greg pretends he has a job at a ritzy country club. But Greg's plan backfires, leaving him in the middle of embarrassing mishaps and a camping trip gone wrong.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Kung Fu Panda 2
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Now known as the Dragon Warrior, Po protects the Valley of Peace alongside his friends and fellow kung fu masters, the Furious Five. However, a dangerous villain threatens Po's awesome new life with plans to use a secret weapon to wipe out the martial art and conquer China. In order to defeat the new enemy, Po finds he must recall his past and unlock secrets of his mysterious origins; only then will he find the strength to vanquish his foe.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Prancer: A Christmas Tale
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Ten-year-old Gloria and her recently widowed grandfather Bud befriend a mysterious reindeer when the family gathers for Christmas. Bud comes to believe that Prancer may actually be magical, but Gloria fears his theory will send him straight to a retirement home. They try to keep the secret while figuring out why the reindeer has appeared, and longstanding rifts within the family are healed along the way.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: MacGruber
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: In the decade since his fiancée was killed, an Army Ranger, Green Beret and Navy SEAL rolled into one has sworn off fighting crime, preferring instead to rock his mullet as a man of peace. But when his sworn enemy, Dieter Von Cunth, steals a nuclear warhead, only MacGruber and his crack team of experts are equal to the task of bringing the villain to justice.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: No Hard Feelings
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: On the brink of losing her childhood home, a desperate woman agrees to date a wealthy couple's introverted and awkward 19-year-old son. However, he proves to be more of a challenge than she expected, and time is running out before she loses it all.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Barbie
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Barbie and Ken are having the time of their lives in the colorful and seemingly perfect world of Barbie Land. However, when they get a chance to go to the real world, they soon discover the joys and perils of living among humans.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: The Suicide Squad
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: The government sends the most dangerous supervillains in the world -- Bloodsport, Peacemaker, King Shark, Harley Quinn and others -- to the remote, enemy-infused island of Corto Maltese. Armed with high-tech weapons, they trek through the dangerous jungle on a search-and-destroy mission, with only Col. Rick Flag on the ground to make them behave.

HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.title: Zola
HBO.Comedy.HD.us2.description: Zola, a Detroit waitress, is seduced into a weekend of stripping in Florida for some quick cash -- but the trip becomes a sleepless 48-hour odyssey involving a nefarious friend, her pimp and her idiot boyfriend.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Materialists
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A young, ambitious New York City matchmaker finds herself torn between the perfect match and her imperfect ex.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Florida Project
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Set in the shadow of the most magical place on Earth, 6-year-old Moonee and her two best friends forge their own adventures, while Moonee's struggling mom and a kindhearted motel manager protect the kids from the harsh reality that surrounds them.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: My Blind Brother
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Bill has always lived in the shadow of his overachieving brother Robbie, an arrogant athlete and local celebrity who happens to be blind. After years of thanklessly helping Robbie achieve one goal after another, Bill finally catches a break when he finds a connection with the charming Rose, who is dealing with her own crisis. But when Rose starts dating Robbie, Bill must decide if he can finally put his own happiness over his brother's and compete for the ultimate prize.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Zola
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Zola, a Detroit waitress, is seduced into a weekend of stripping in Florida for some quick cash -- but the trip becomes a sleepless 48-hour odyssey involving a nefarious friend, her pimp and her idiot boyfriend.
A time traveler risks his life to change the course of history and save the future of humanity.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Unbreakable Tatiana Suarez
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A chronicle of the MMA fighter Tatiana Suarez as she returns to the sport after an injury forced a four-year hiatus; Suarez reflects on her journey from wrestling prodigy to professional athlete in the UFC and the legacy she leaves young women.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Super/Man: The Christopher Reeve Story
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Actor Christopher Reeve rises to stardom when he lands the role of Superman in the 1970s. When a horse-riding accident leaves him paralyzed in 1995, Reeve spends the rest of his life searching for a cure for spinal cord injuries.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Superman: The Movie
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Just before the destruction of the planet Krypton, scientist Jor-El (Marlon Brando) sends his infant son Kal-El on a spaceship to Earth. Raised by kindly farmers Jonathan (Glenn Ford) and Martha Kent (Phyllis Thaxter), young Clark (Christopher Reeve) discovers the source of his superhuman powers and moves to Metropolis to fight evil. As Superman, he battles the villainous Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman), while, as novice reporter Clark Kent, he attempts to woo co-worker Lois Lane (Margot Kidder).

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Superman II
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Superman (Christopher Reeve) foils the plot of terrorists by hurtling their nuclear device into outer space, but the bomb's shock waves free the Kryptonian villain General Zod (Terence Stamp) and his henchmen Ursa (Sarah Douglas) and Non (Jack O'Halloran) from their imprisonment. Traveling to Earth, they threaten the planet with destruction at the same time that Superman decides to renounce his superpowers in order to live a normal life as Clark Kent with his new love, Lois Lane (Margot Kidder).

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Superman III
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Computer programmer Gus Gorman (Richard Pryor) is hired by financial tycoon Ross Webster (Robert Vaughn) to seize control of a weather satellite and annihilate Colombia's coffee crop. When Superman (Christopher Reeve) manages to thwart the plan, Webster commands Gorman to use the satellite to locate kryptonite, the Man of Steel's mortal weakness. But a missing unknown element in the kryptonite -- replaced by Gorman with tar -- causes an unintended side effect when presented to Superman.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Superman IV: The Quest for Peace
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Seeing the United States and the Soviet Union engaged in a nuclear arms race that could lead to Earth's destruction, Superman (Christopher Reeve) decides that he must take action. He collects all the nuclear warheads from the world and throws them into space. Meanwhile, Superman's nemesis, Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman), has broken out of prison with a new scheme. He clones Superman with radioactive material to create Nuclear Man (Mark Pillow), a being just as powerful as the man of steel.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Superman Returns
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: While Lex Luthor plots to destroy him once and for all, the Man of Steel returns after a long absence to a much-changed world. Lois Lane has moved on with her life, and society has learned to survive without him. Superman must find a way to reconnect with her and find his place in a world that may no longer need him.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Man of Steel
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: With the imminent destruction of Krypton, their home planet, Jor-El (Russell Crowe) and his wife seek to preserve their race by sending their infant son to Earth. The child's spacecraft lands at the farm of Jonathan (Kevin Costner) and Martha (Diane Lane) Kent, who name him Clark and raise him as their own son. Though his extraordinary abilities have led to the adult Clark (Henry Cavill) living on the fringe of society, he finds he must become a hero to save those he loves from a dire threat.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Superman
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Just before the destruction of the planet Krypton, scientist Jor-El (Marlon Brando) sends his infant son Kal-El on a spaceship to Earth. Raised by kindly farmers Jonathan (Glenn Ford) and Martha Kent (Phyllis Thaxter), young Clark (Christopher Reeve) discovers the source of his superhuman powers and moves to Metropolis to fight evil. As Superman, he battles the villainous Lex Luthor (Gene Hackman), while, as novice reporter Clark Kent, he attempts to woo co-worker Lois Lane (Margot Kidder).

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Mummy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Nick Morton is a soldier of fortune who plunders ancient sites for timeless artifacts and sells them to the highest bidder. When Nick and his partner come under attack in the Middle East, the ensuing battle accidentally unearths Ahmanet, a betrayed Egyptian princess who was entombed under the desert for thousands of years. With her powers constantly evolving, Morton must now stop the resurrected monster as she embarks on a furious rampage through the streets of London.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: A Good Day to Die Hard
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: New York City cop John McClane (Bruce Willis) arrives in Moscow to track down his estranged son, Jack (Jai Courtney). McClane thinks his son is a criminal, so it comes as a shock when he learns that Jack is actually working undercover to protect Komarov (Sebastian Koch), a Russian government whistleblower. With their own lives on the line, McClane and Jack must overcome their differences in order to get Komarov to safety and thwart a potentially disastrous crime in the Chernobyl region.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Babygirl
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A high-powered CEO puts her career and family on the line when she begins a torrid affair with her much younger intern.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Batman
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Batman ventures into Gotham City's underworld when a sadistic killer leaves behind a trail of cryptic clues. As the scale of the perpetrator's plans become clear, he must bring justice to the abuse of power and corruption that plagues the metropolis.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box: Counting Crows: Have You Seen Me Lately?
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After their debut album's success, Counting Crows and singer Adam Duritz became global rock stars; interviews and 90s footage show how they navigated sudden fame while staying true to their art.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box: DMX: Don't Try To Understand
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Focusing on a year in the life of Earl "DMX" Simmons, this documentary follows the late rapper through his 2019 comeback tour after serving a year in prison and uses archival materials to chronicle his struggle with addiction.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Mr. Saturday Night
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: The untold story of Robert Stigwood and how he amped up the disco era.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Greatest Showman
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Growing up in the early 1800s, P.T. Barnum displays a natural talent for publicity and promotion, selling lottery tickets by age 12. After trying his hands at various jobs, P.T. turns to show business to indulge his limitless imagination, rising from nothing to create the Barnum & Bailey circus. Featuring catchy musical numbers, exotic performers and daring acrobatic feats, Barnum's mesmerizing spectacle soon takes the world by storm to become the greatest show on Earth.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Everything Everywhere All at Once
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: When an interdimensional rupture unravels reality, an unlikely hero must channel her newfound powers to fight bizarre and bewildering dangers from the multiverse.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Meg 2: The Trench
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Jonas Taylor leads a research team on an exploratory dive into the deepest depths of the ocean. Their voyage spirals into chaos when a malevolent mining operation threatens their mission and forces them into a high-stakes battle for survival. Pitted against colossal, prehistoric sharks and relentless environmental plunderers, they must outrun, outsmart and outswim their merciless predators.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Insidious: The Last Key
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Brilliant parapsychologist Elise Rainier receives a disturbing phone call from a man who claims that his house is haunted. Even more disturbing is the address -- 413 Apple Tree Lane in Five Keys, N.M. -- the home where Elise grew up as a child. Accompanied by her two investigative partners, Rainier travels to Five Keys to confront and destroy her greatest fear -- the demon that she accidentally set free years earlier.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Insidious: The Red Door
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Josh Lambert heads east to drop his son, Dalton, off at school. However, Dalton's college dream soon becomes a living nightmare when the repressed demons of his past suddenly return to haunt them both.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dust Bunny
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Ten-year-old Aurora asks a hit man to kill the monster she believes ate her entire family. To protect her, he'll need to battle an onslaught of assassins while accepting the fact that some monsters are real.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Curse of La Llorona
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In the 1970s Los Angeles, the legendary ghost La Llorona is stalking the night -- and the children. Ignoring the eerie warning of a troubled mother, a social worker and her own kids are drawn into a frightening supernatural realm. Their only hope of surviving La Llorona's deadly wrath is a disillusioned priest who practices mysticism to keep evil at bay.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: A Most Violent Year
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1981 New York, a fuel supplier (Oscar Isaac) tries to adhere to his own moral compass amid the rampant violence, corruption and decay that threaten his family and his business.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Lola Versus
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Just three weeks before her wedding, Lola (Greta Gerwig) finds herself suddenly without a partner when her longtime fiancé, Luke (Joel Kinnaman), dumps her. With her 30th birthday looming and being forced to re-enter the New York City dating scene, she feels adrift in a cold world. She leans on her friends (Zoe Lister-Jones, Hamish Linklater) for support but, after a series of romantic humiliations, professional blunders and boozy antics, Lola realizes that she alone is in charge of her fate.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Ne Zha 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Born to mortal parents, a rebellious young demigod uses his immense powers to battle an ancient force that's bent on humanity's destruction.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Puss in Boots
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Long before meeting Shrek, Puss in Boots, just named a hero for saving a woman from a charging bull, is run out of town on suspicion of bank robbery, even though the real villain is Puss' friend, Humpty Dumpty. Though there is still animosity between them, Puss and Humpty reunite to steal a goose that lays golden eggs. Joining them for the adventure of nine lifetimes is notorious cat burglar, Kitty Softpaws.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box: Wizkid: Long Live Lagos
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Tracing the roots and global rise of Nigerian superstar Wizkid as he prepares for his first major stadium concert.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: Jagged
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: An intimate exploration of Alanis Morissette and her groundbreaking 1995 album "Jagged Little Pill.".

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Music Box: Listening to Kenny G
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Saxophonist Kenny G speaks candidly about his musical background, his stringent work ethic and his controversial standing in the jazz canon.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Day the Earth Blew Up: A Looney Tunes Movie
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Porky Pig and Daffy Duck become Earth's only hope when their antics at the local bubble-gum factory uncover a secret alien mind-control plot. Faced with cosmic odds, they must save their town and the world while not driving each other totally loony.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Perfect Match
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Charlie (Terrence J) is a charming playboy who doesn't believe in serious relationships. His best friends bet him that if he commits to one woman for one month, he's bound to fall in love. Charlie accepts the seemingly easy challenge, but wasn't expecting to cross paths with the beautiful and mysterious Eva (Cassie Ventura). When Charlie coaxes her into a casual affair, Eva turns the tables on him, forcing the lifelong bachelor to question whether he wants more than just a one-night stand.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1970, paranormal investigators and demonologists Lorraine (Vera Farmiga) and Ed (Patrick Wilson) Warren are summoned to the home of Carolyn (Lili Taylor) and Roger (Ron Livingston) Perron. The Perrons and their five daughters have recently moved into a secluded farmhouse, where a supernatural presence has made itself known. Though the manifestations are relatively benign at first, events soon escalate in horrifying fashion, especially after the Warrens discover the house's macabre history.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1977, paranormal investigators Ed (Patrick Wilson) and Lorraine Warren come out of a self-imposed sabbatical to travel to Enfield, a borough in north London. There, they meet Peggy Hodgson, an overwhelmed single mother of four who tells the couple that something evil is in her home. Ed and Lorraine believe her story when the youngest daughter starts to show signs of demonic possession. As the Warrens try to help the besieged girl, they become the next targets of the malicious spirit.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: The Devil Made Me Do It
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren take on one of the most sensational cases of their careers after a cop stumbles upon a dazed and bloodied young man walking down the road. Accused of murder, the suspect claims demonic possession as his defense, forcing the Warrens into a supernatural inquiry unlike anything they've ever seen before.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Conjuring: Last Rites
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In 1986 paranormal investigators Ed and Lorraine Warren travel to Pennsylvania to vanquish a demon from a family's home.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Bring Me the Beauties
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.subtitle: The Antichrist Tapes
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: As Frederick prepares for a coming global cataclysm, model Jacki Adams joins Eternal Values and exposes the group's true nature.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Judy
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Thirty years after starring in "The Wizard of Oz," beloved actress and singer Judy Garland arrives in London to perform sold-out shows at the Talk of the Town nightclub. While there, she reminisces with friends and fans and begins a whirlwind romance with musician Mickey Deans, her soon-to-be fifth husband.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: I Love You Forever
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Following a young woman into and out of an emotionally abusive relationship.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Dr. Seuss' The Cat in the Hat
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: In this live-action film based on the favorite children's tale, the trouble-making Cat in the Hat (Mike Myers) arrives at the home of bored young Sally Walden (Dakota Fanning) and her brother, Conrad (Spencer Breslin), while their mother (Kelly Preston) is out. The family's pet fish (Sean Hayes) objects to the Cat's presence, but that doesn't stop the hat-wearing giant feline from trying to have fun, no matter how much destruction is left in his wake.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The A List: 15 Stories From Asian and Pacific Diasporas
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: A tapestry of personal vignettes from across the Asian American, Native Hawaiian and Pacific Islander, also known as the AANHPI, communities in America.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: The Commandant's Shadow
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Hans Jürgen Höss, the 87-year-old son of Rudolf Höss, as he faces his father's terrible legacy for the first time. His father was the camp commandant of Auschwitz and masterminded the murder of over a million Jews. While Hans Jürgen Höss enjoyed a happy childhood playing with many toys in the family villa at Auschwitz, Jewish cellist Anita Lasker-Wallfisch was playing for her life to survive the notorious concentration camp.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Joker
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Forever alone in a crowd, failed comedian Arthur Fleck seeks connection as he walks the streets of Gotham City. Arthur wears two masks -- the one he paints for his day job as a clown, and the guise he projects in a futile attempt to feel like he's part of the world around him. Isolated, bullied and disregarded by society, Fleck begins a slow descent into madness as he transforms into the criminal mastermind known as the Joker.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: Joker: Folie à Deux
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Struggling with his dual identity, failed comedian Arthur Fleck stumbles upon true love while incarcerated at Arkham State Hospital. Awaiting trial for the murder of five people, Fleck soon discovers the music that's always been inside him.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Legendary assassin John Wick (Keanu Reeves) retired from his violent career after marrying the love of his life. Her sudden death leaves John in deep mourning. When sadistic mobster Iosef Tarasov (Alfie Allen) and his thugs steal John's prized car and kill the puppy that was a last gift from his wife, John unleashes the remorseless killing machine within and seeks vengeance. Meanwhile, Iosef's father (Michael Nyqvist) -- John's former colleague -- puts a huge bounty on John's head.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 2
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: Retired super-assassin John Wick's plans to resume a quiet civilian life are cut short when Italian gangster Santino D'Antonio shows up on his doorstep with a gold marker, compelling him to repay past favors. Ordered by Winston, kingpin of secret assassin society The Continental, to respect the organization's ancient code, Wick reluctantly accepts the assignment to travel to Rome to take out D'Antonio's sister, the ruthless capo atop the Italian Camorra crime syndicate.

HBO.Zone.HD.us2.title: John Wick: Chapter 3 -- Parabellum
HBO.Zone.HD.us2.description: After gunning down a member of the High Table -- the shadowy international assassin's guild -- legendary hit man John Wick finds himself stripped of the organization's protective services. NBC.East.Stream.us2.title: Open House
NBC.East.Stream.us2.description: Buying a house can be a stressful, time-consuming process, which is why people turn to shows such as "Open House" to get help in the real estate market. Hosts Sara Gore and George Oliphant (who also rescues homeowners' renovation projects on sister show "George to the Rescue," which began as a segment of "Open House" before becoming a stand-alone show) showcase some of the hottest homes on the market in major cities, get interior design tips from experts and provide information on what people need to know about stylish living.

Now, with sharks outnumbering their human captors, McAlester and her team must figure out a way to stop them from escaping to the ocean and breeding.

With glitz, glamour and the world's greatest players, this was soccer's wild child league, which soared to colossal heights, only to implode on itself.

truTV.HD.us2.title: Cinderella Man
truTV.HD.us2.description: During the Great Depression, ex-boxer James J. Braddock (Russell Crowe) works as a day laborer until his former manager Joe Gould (Paul Giamatti) offers him a one-time slot against a rising young contender. After he wins a shocking upset, Braddock goes back into the ring full time, against the wishes of his frightened wife, Mae (Renée Zellweger). Dubbed "The Cinderella Man" for his rags-to-riches story, Braddock sets his sights on the defending champion, the fearsome Max Baer (Craig Bierko).

TBS.HD.us2.title: Ocean's Eleven
TBS.HD.us2.description: Dapper Danny Ocean is a man of action. Less than 24 hours into his parole from a New Jersey penitentiary, the wry, charismatic thief is already rolling out his next plan. Danny orchestrates the most sophisticated, elaborate casino heist in history.

TBS.HD.us2.title: Ocean's Thirteen
TBS.HD.us2.description: Danny Ocean and his gang hatch an ambitious plot for revenge after ruthless casino owner Willy Bank double-crosses Reuben Tishkoff, Danny's friend and mentor. First, Ocean's gang plan to hit Bank in the paycheck by reversing the precept that the house always wins. Next, they will deal a crushing blow to Bank's ego by ruining his reputation as the only hotelier to earn the Royal Review's Five Diamond Award for each of his properties.

As the excursion wears on, the Ripleys find themselves at odds with the stuffy Craig family.

AMC.HD.us2.description: In April 2009, the U.S. container ship Maersk Alabama sails toward its destination on a day that seems like any other. Suddenly, Somali pirates race toward the vessel, climb aboard and take everyone hostage. The captain of the ship, Richard Phillips, looks to protect his crew from the hostile invaders, and their leader, Muse. The pirates are after millions of dollars, and Phillips must use his wits to make sure everyone survives and returns home safely.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Independence Day
AMC.HD.us2.description: In the epic adventure film "Independence Day," strange phenomena surface around the globe. The skies ignite. Terror races through the world's major cities. As these extraordinary events unfold, it becomes increasingly clear that a force of incredible magnitude has arrived; its mission: total annihilation over the Fourth of July weekend. The last hope to stop the destruction is an unlikely group of people united by fate and unimaginable circumstances.

AMC.HD.us2.title: True Lies
AMC.HD.us2.description: Secretly a spy but thought by his family to be a dull salesman, Harry Tasker (Arnold Schwarzenegger) is tracking down nuclear missiles in the possession of Islamic jihadist Aziz (Art Malik). Harry's mission is complicated when he realizes his neglected wife, Helen (Jamie Lee Curtis), is contemplating an affair with Simon (Bill Paxton), a used-car salesman who claims he's a spy. When Aziz kidnaps Harry and Helen, the secret agent must save the world and patch up his marriage at the same time.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Knives Out
AMC.HD.us2.description: The circumstances surrounding the death of crime novelist Harlan Thrombey are mysterious, but there's one thing that renowned Detective Benoit Blanc knows for sure -- everyone in the wildly dysfunctional Thrombey family is a suspect. Now, Blanc must sift through a web of lies and red herrings to uncover the truth.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Just Go With It
AMC.HD.us2.description: His heart recently broken, plastic surgeon Danny Maccabee (Adam Sandler) pretends to be married so he can enjoy future dates with no strings attached. His web of lies works, but when he meets Palmer (Brooklyn Decker) -- the gal of his dreams -- she resists involvement. Instead of coming clean, Danny enlists Katherine (Jennifer Aniston), his assistant, to pose as his soon-to-be-ex-wife. Instead of solving Danny's problems, the lies create more trouble.

AMC.HD.us2.title: 50 First Dates
AMC.HD.us2.description: Playboy vet Henry sets his heart on romancing Lucy, but she has short-term memory loss. She can't remember anything that happened the day before. So every morning, Henry has to woo her again. Her friends and family are very protective and Henry must convince them that he's in it for love.

Milo considers the job an easy payday, but Nicole quickly escapes to chase a lead on a murder case. The former spouses play an escalating game of one-upmanship, until they suddenly find themselves on the run for their lives.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Fool's Gold

When he finds a vital clue that may finally pinpoint the treasure's whereabouts, he drags Tess and her boss, billionaire Nigel Honeycutt, along on the hunt. But Finn is not the only one interested in the gold; his former mentor-turned-enemy Moe Fitch (Ray Winstone) will stop at nothing to beat him to it.

But when Howe betrays him, Gates has to race to get to the document ahead of his so-called colleague.

When the unbearable Deetzes and teen daughter Lydia buy the home, the Maitlands attempt to scare them away without success. Their efforts attract Beetlejuice, a rambunctious spirit whose help quickly becomes dangerous for the Maitlands and innocent Lydia.

AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Toledo
AMC.HD.us2.description: Lestat revisits his origins in Auvergne, explores Toledo with a recent reconnection, and deals with the fallout from Detroit, facing both band tensions and a disgruntled hotel owner.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Vampire Lestat
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Toledo
AMC.HD.us2.description: Lestat revisits his origins in Auvergne, explores Toledo with a recent reconnection, and deals with the fallout from Detroit, facing both band tensions and a disgruntled hotel owner.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Cast Away
AMC.HD.us2.description: Obsessively punctual FedEx executive Chuck Noland (Tom Hanks) is en route to an assignment in Malaysia when his plane crashes over the Pacific Ocean during a storm. The sole survivor of the flight, Chuck washes ashore on a deserted island. When his efforts to sail away and contact help fail, Chuck learns how to survive on the island, where he remains for years, accompanied by only his handmade volleyball friend, Wilson. Will Chuck ever return to civilization and reunite with his loved ones?

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Vampire Lestat
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Toledo
AMC.HD.us2.description: Lestat revisits his origins in Auvergne, explores Toledo with a recent reconnection, and deals with the fallout from Detroit, facing both band tensions and a disgruntled hotel owner.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Last Stand
AMC.HD.us2.description: Once a narcotics officer in the LAPD, Ray Owens settles into a peaceful life as sheriff of Sommerton Junction, a quiet border town. That peace is shattered when Gabriel Cortez, a vicious crime lord, escapes from FBI custody and speeds toward Ray's town with a band of mercenaries. Federal agents prepare to capture Cortez. Ray is at first reluctant to get involved, but he soon finds he must rally his team and take matters into his own hands.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Pardon My Scotch
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Stooges are running the local drugstore, mixing up a potion that a desperate businessman decides to sell as scotch.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Three Stooges
AMC.HD.us2.subtitle: Pop Goes the Easel
AMC.HD.us2.description: The Stooges are down and out; with a cop chasing them, they flee into an artists' studio where they are mistaken for students.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Freedom to Leave the House! Inogen Portable Oxygen
AMC.HD.us2.description: Regain independence and enjoy greater mobility with the compact design and long-lasting battery of portable oxygen.

AMC.HD.us2.title: RateEscape: Stop Overpaying For Cellular
AMC.HD.us2.description: Cut up to half the cost of your monthly cell phone bill; same towers, same coverage, but a lot less money; it sounds great but is it too good to be true?; join myth-busting legend Kari Byron as she takes on Big Wireless to save you money.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Nursing Home Nightmares 2026
AMC.HD.us2.description: This is a must-see program if you have a loved one in a nursing home; go behind the scenes and find out what really goes on when you're not there, and all that's wrong with today's nursing homes; you will learn exactly what you can do if you.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Natural Blood Pressure Management
AMC.HD.us2.description: Cardiologist Dr. Ernst von Schwarz, M.D. shows how to manage your blood pressure naturally and help protect your heart for life with My Best Heart.

AMC.HD.us2.title: An Aetna Medicare Advantage plan might be right for you
AMC.HD.us2.description: When it comes to Medicare coverage, there are a lot of options. Learn about your choices so that you can select the coverage that's right for you. Call to speak with a licensed Aetna agent today.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Overwhelmed with IRS Debt? Keys to Resolving Tax Debt
AMC.HD.us2.description: See how one company is changing people's lives by helping them put their tax problems to rest.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Jurassic Park III
AMC.HD.us2.description: After being persuaded by a wealthy businessman to conduct an aerial tour of Isla Sorna, InGen's second site for a failed Jurassic Park experiment, Dr. Alan Grant discovers the true reason for his invitation. A tragic accident maroons the party of seven, and they must attempt to escape with their lives.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Jurassic Park
AMC.HD.us2.description: In Steven Spielberg's massive blockbuster, paleontologists Alan Grant (Sam Neill) and Ellie Sattler (Laura Dern) and mathematician Ian Malcolm (Jeff Goldblum) are among a select group chosen to tour an island theme park populated by dinosaurs created from prehistoric DNA. While the park's mastermind, billionaire John Hammond (Richard Attenborough), assures everyone that the facility is safe, they find out otherwise when various ferocious predators break free and go on the hunt.

AMC.HD.us2.title: The Lost World: Jurassic Park
AMC.HD.us2.description: Four years after "Jurassic Park," mathematician Ian Malcolm ventures onto a second island to save his girlfriend from becoming dinosaur bait.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Goodfellas
AMC.HD.us2.description: Henry Hill, a poor Irish-Italian growing up in the 1950s New York City, rises through the ranks of his neighborhood's organized crime branch; he ends up in the FBI's witness protection program after testifying against his former partners.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Man on Fire
AMC.HD.us2.description: In a Mexico City wracked by a recent wave of kidnappings, ex-CIA operative John Creasy (Denzel Washington) reluctantly accepts a job as a bodyguard for 9-year-old Lupita (Dakota Fanning), the daughter of wealthy businessman Samuel Ramos (Marc Anthony). Just as Creasy begins to develop a fondness for the young girl, a bloodthirsty gunman (Jesús Ochoa) kidnaps her. Now, Creasy must pick off a succession of corrupt cops and criminals to reach his ultimate object of vengeance.

AMC.HD.us2.title: Unstoppable
AMC.HD.us2.description: When a massive, unmanned locomotive roars out of control, the threat is more ominous than just a derailment. The train is laden with toxic chemicals, and an accident would decimate human life and cause an environmental disaster. The only hope of bringing the train to a safe stop is in the hands of a veteran engineer (Denzel Washington) and a young conductor (Chris Pine), who must risk their lives to save those in the runaway's path. Inspired by true events.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jornada 1 del Grupo A. México se enfrenta a Sudáfrica desde el Estadio Ciudad de México. Ambos equipos ya chocaron en el partido inaugural de Sudáfrica 2010, registrando un empate por 1-1.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Jardín seco
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: María no puede darle un hijo a su esposo Pedro y el matrimonio se termina. Ella reniega de la vida y de su fe, pero Diego aparece en su vida y la reconcilia con el amor. Ambos reciben un milagro.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por la herencia son capaces de todo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Liliana asegura que sus hermanos quieren dejar morir a su madre, de 89 años, para quedarse con sus bienes. Su hijo y nuera, con quienes vive, no la tratan bien ni le brindan apoyo económico.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Las joyas de mamá; Negocio de bailarinas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Noelia y su hermano pelean por el capital de un negocio que ella estableció con el dinero de la venta de unas joyas de su fallecida madre, sin saber que aún está viva.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi condena; En un solo pie
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ángel, ex-guardia de seguridad en un penal, cumple condena por, supuestamente, violar a una presa. El hijo de Yancy padece cáncer de huesos y al amputarle una pierna, truncan sus sueños.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Tres generaciones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Para Adriana es difícil superar el divorcio de sus padres y se deja influenciar por malas compañías. Ella y su mamá se mudan a la casa de la abuela y las tres generaciones juntas enfrentan una nueva vida.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La mentira
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La vida de Romina cambia cuando su esposo muere durante un asalto a su casa. Carlos, uno de los asaltantes, no puede superar la culpa y busca acercarse a ella.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vencer el miedo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Danilo engañó a Mónica y abusó de ella cuando estaban en la universidad. Ella nunca lo denunció, pero ahora él intenta chantajearla.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Miriam: Descubriendo mi fuerza
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Miriam vive en un ambiente de violencia, por eso se va de su casa al quedar embarazada, pero al perder a su bebé, se reencuentra con su madre. Así confirman que, juntas, pueden salir adelante.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Felipa: Un grito por todas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Felipa sufre la brutal muerte de su hija, quien fue violada y asesinada. La joven delataba en su blog a los responsables de atacar a mujeres indefensas y la indiferencia de las autoridades.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Falsa identidad
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Identidad legal
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Piensan en un futuro mejor y sin problemas, Isabel y Diego están listos para disfrutar en familia. Pero un enemigo desquiciado y con sed de venganza está al acecho. Circe busca escapar.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Próximos novios
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Geraldine y Cristian son amigos que buscan hacer equipo para ganarse el automóvil, pero prefieren retirarse con sus premios antes de perderlos. Gabriela y Daniel quieren ganar el viaje a la playa, pero una mala respuesta los deja fuera.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Estocolmo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Aníbal tiene muchos asuntos pendientes, entre ellos Regina, quien es su mayor obstáculo y a la vez lo más valioso que tiene. En las 24 horas que le quedan, su amor debe enderezarse o morir.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mamá se enredó con el amigo de mi papá
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La familia está enfrentada por la decisión de Carolina que, ante los maltratos y abusos de su esposo, comenzó una nueva vida. Blanca, su hija, se opone a esa relación por las consecuencias.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Por la herencia son capaces de todo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Liliana asegura que sus hermanos quieren dejar morir a su madre, de 89 años, para quedarse con sus bienes. Su hijo y nuera, con quienes vive, no la tratan bien ni le brindan apoyo económico.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Prima ALS; La desgracia de la familia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luis acogió a su prima en su casa, pero la jovencita está descontrolada, su esposa le pide que la eche. Además, Carolina recibió en su casa a su hermano y el joven descubrió su pasado porno.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Los sugar también tenemos corazón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Juan no quiere que su hermana Rebeca se entrometa en su vida, ella le reclama porque busca mujeres mucho más jóvenes que él, les da dinero y luego le son infieles, incluso hasta con su hijo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Romina: Una nueva vida
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Romina se lleva mal con su mamá y se muda con su papá quien le permite organizar una fiesta donde ella es abusada. Arrepentida, regresa con su madre y ambas cuentan su experiencia en un blog.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jornada 1 del Grupo D. Estados Unidos inicia su camino mundialista frente a Paraguay desde el Estadio Los Ángeles. Los estadounidenses buscarán repetir el triunfo de la Copa América 2016.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jornada 1 del Grupo B. Canadá inaugura su participación en casa frente a Bosnia y Herzegovina desde el Estadio Toronto. Primer enfrentamiento oficial entre ambas selecciones en una Copa Mundial.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Con la Muerte en Ancas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dos pistoleros, con personalidades distintas, uno, un hombre justo, y el otro, un asesino psicópata, buscan la venganza.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Debieron ahorcarlos antes
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dos sujetos roban el oro del ejército, Silvestre es aprendido, pero el abuelo huye junto a Joe Oaxaca y el federal Tomás Bueno. Se desata un tiroteo del que tendrán que salir bien librados.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lucio Vázquez
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lucio intenta evitar más muertes, frustrado quiere venganza, pero su novia se lo impide. Al final, pierde a su líder, Emiliano Zapata, a su padre y también a Evangelina, la mujer que ama.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cazador cazado; Papá aunque use vestido
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Richard y Esmirenny perdieron a su hijo cuando un oso lo atacó; él pretende vengarse, pero ella no lo apoya. Gaby no pudo disfrutar de una fiesta con su padre porque él fue vestido de mujer.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Educación brutal; Trampa en el crucero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Bárbara quiere la custodia de sus hijas, por eso refina su vocabulario. También, Alicia le tiende una trampa a su esposo en un crucero, él pierde el control y lo detienen, ahora será deportado.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Vendió a su hija; Romeo chamuscado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Yosdel ha descubierto que la madre de su hija la vendió clandestinamente y viene con pruebas para que se le reconozca como padre de la criatura y obtener la custodia total de su hija. Ángeles no ha podido tener hijos y para canalizar ese sentimiento su esposo Andrés le regaló un perro, pero ella se ha obsesionado con el animal y él tomó la decisión de desaparecerlo, sin saber que ella conocería que el perro Romeo fue quemado vivo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Los sugar también tenemos corazón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Juan no quiere que su hermana Rebeca se entrometa en su vida, ella le reclama porque busca mujeres mucho más jóvenes que él, les da dinero y luego le son infieles, incluso hasta con su hijo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío al límite
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi nuera golpea a mi hijo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Héctor sospecha que su hijo Fernando es víctima de maltrato y humillación por parte de su nuera. Hay una grabación que despeja las dudas sobre si hay o no violencia doméstica en la familia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Duelo en El Dorado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Poveda, el cacique, se presenta como padre legítimo de un niño y lo rapta. El ex pistolero comienza una intensa lucha con el secuestrador para rescatar al niño.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Los profetas; Bebé rechazado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Pilar critica a Francisco de ganar dinero al poner a sus hijos a cantar alabanzas a Dios con ritmos modernos. Hombre negro quiere el divorcio, pues su mujer es racista y se embarazó de un blanco.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Con mis mejores amigos; Defecando en el restaurante
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tiene una hija con leucemia y ella le echa la culpa al padre. Ashley va al restaurante de Carlos con urgencia de ir al baño y al negárselo, no tiene más opción que defecar delante de todos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Odio latino; Metió preso a mi marido
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: El marido de Karla recibe una orden de deportación por culpa de Mirza, quien llamó a la policía porque ellos viven del gobierno. Leonel envía a la cárcel al esposo de Mariposa, su amante.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sueldo secreto; Dos pájaros de un tiro
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Ana María quiere que Martín la compense salarialmente por pagarle menos durante dos años. Francisco pide que su ex-nuera desaloje el apartamento y le pague por incumplir el contrato de renta.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El amor no cree en ADN; Falsos culpables
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Luisa casa a su hija discapacitada con Andrés para optar por un tratamiento y ahora que la joven recibe una herencia quiere divorciarlos. Demandan a Jaime por publicar una noticia falsa.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jornada 1 del Grupo B. Catar y Suiza se enfrentan desde el Estadio Bahía de San Francisco. Los europeos buscarán la victoria después de haber sido derrotados 1-0 en un amistoso contra los cataríes.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jornada 1 del Grupo C. Brasil enfrenta a Marruecos desde el Estadio Nueva York Nueva Jersey. Los africanos sorprendieron al derrotar a La Canarinha por 2-1 en un amistoso disputado en 2023.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: El desconocido
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Adalberto, deportado de Estados Unidos, es testigo de un homicidio y termina casado con Carmen, la hija del difunto. Tres hombres se disputan a su mujer y él, en venganza, acaba con ellos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: El Coyote y la Bronca
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Juan, alias el Coyote, y Trinidad, conocida como la Bronca, viven muchas aventuras en el bajo mundo del dinero fácil y la prostitución, hasta que un asesinato los obliga a escapar y los convierte en pareja.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi papá se quiere dar a mi novia
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Víctor cree que su padre anda tras su novia, pero él afirma que su hijo malinterpreta sus acciones.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío al límite
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi nuera golpea a mi hijo
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Héctor sospecha que su hijo Fernando es víctima de maltrato y humillación por parte de su nuera. Hay una grabación que despeja las dudas sobre si hay o no violencia doméstica en la familia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Nos quitó la vida; Venganza de la ex
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Quiere ser la guardiana del amigo de su hijo para llenar el espacio que él dejó al morir. Escapa para evitar ser descubierto y se lesiona, ahora no puede practicar su pasión: el paracaidismo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Live: Béisbol MLB
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Tercer juego de la serie regular de la MLB 2026. Texas Rangers visita a Boston Red Sox. Desde el Fenway Park, en Boston, Massachusetts.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: El Diablo, el Santo y el Tonto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Antes de morir un hombre revela a su hijo que tiene dos hermanastros a los que debe buscar para dividir la herencia, una cantina, un hospital y un rancho.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jornada 1 del Grupo F. Países Bajos se enfrenta a Japón desde el Estadio Dallas. En el Mundial de Sudáfrica 2010, los neerlandeses vencieron a los nipones 1-0 en partido del Grupo E.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Lo mejor de 12 corazones: Baile
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: 12 corazones
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Lo mejor de 12 Corazones: Playero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Un programa de concurso picante, ligero y excitante el cual busca formar una o varias parejas entre los participantes que se gusten y se sientan atraídos.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Que no me olvide
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La madre de Laura tiene problemas de memoria y su hija la califica de inútil. Entonces, ella se refugia en su otro hijo, Camilo. Cuando la situación se complica, descubren que se trata de un caso de Alzhéimer.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Sin huevos; Castigo para el bullying
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Raquel es esquizofrénica y, bajo un ataque de celos, le arranca de una mordida los genitales a su esposo. Luciana acusa a Luis de ser el autor intelectual del suicidio de su amiga.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Lesión mortal; La casa caliente
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Pedro fue golpeado por vándalos y en la cirugía dañaron su cerebro, ahora no controla sus instintos sexuales. Alexandra descubre que su inquilina tiene un negocio clandestino de placer.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jornada 1 del Grupo E. Costa de Marfil y Ecuador se enfrentan desde el Estadio Filadelfia. Dos selecciones con perfiles defensivos se enfrentan por primera vez en toda su historia.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Perdóname mamá
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Delia decide asumir la responsabilidad por la falta de su hijo Adán. Delia debe ir a la cárcel y dejar solos a sus otros hijos Gabriel y Lisbeth. Tras su sacrificio, recibe la recompensa que tanto esperaba.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Historias de la Virgen morena
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Hermanos por destino
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Dos bebés fueron cambiados al nacer en el hospital. Santiago y Andrés, ahora adolescentes, se enfrentan a una verdad que altera sus vidas y la de sus padres.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Menores trabajando
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Flor busca desesperadamente un trabajo para poder ayudar a su abuelita.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Blanca: A ciegas
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Blanca conoce a Jaime y a los pocos meses se mudan juntos, ella no sabe que él está involucrado en lavado de dinero y lo descubre demasiado tarde. Termina tras las rejas acusada de complicidad.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Lo que callamos las mujeres
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Más que un sueño
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Regina pierde a su esposo y tienen que lidiar con todo, incluido el problema físico de su hija. Un día conoce a Rafael y se hacen amigos, pero descubre que fue él quien atropelló a su marido.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Escape perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: La fatal primera pregunta
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Mayte y Guillermo quieren llevarse muchos premios, pero desafortunadamente se van en la primera pregunta. Ana María y Armando también salen en la primera pregunta.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Un día para vivir
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: El hombre perfecto
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: La ira ciega a Germán, incapaz de reconocerse a sí mismo. Incluso cuando la muerte, Ella, le da un límite de tiempo, las consecuencias de sus decisiones producen estragos y codependencias.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Me juzgan por mandilón
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Manuel no soporta que su madre lo critique. Él se siente feliz al encargarse de todas las tareas del hogar, además de trabajar como electricista, mientras su esposa solo atiende a su hijo.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Lo protege por mediocre
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Adriana quiere dejarle el negocio a Óscar, su hijo menor. José, el mayor, está furioso porque cree que su madre justifica todos los errores de su hermano, a quien considera irresponsable.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Ilusiones rentadas; Instinto para dinero fácil
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: María contrata a unos actores vestidos de policía para intimidar a su hijo descarriado, pero todo resulta mal. Zoraida se da cuenta de que York finge accidentes para cobrar la indemnización.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Caso cerrado
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Cambio maldito; El paquetero
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Lily asegura que la muerte de su hijo fue producto de un trabajo de santería, su amigo pide que la internen en un psiquiátrico. Una mujer descubre que el amor de su vida es un simple estafador.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Acércate a Rocío
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.subtitle: Mi mamá me arrebató a mi bebé
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Andrea le reclama a su mamá Diana por la desaparición de su bebé, pero ella se defiende y asegura que hace lo correcto por el bien de todos. Ahora muchos se preguntan por el destino del menor.

UNIVERSO.HD.us2.title: Copa Mundial de la FIFA 2026
UNIVERSO.HD.us2.description: Jornada 1 del Grupo H. España enfrenta a Cabo Verde desde el Estadio Atlanta. Los españoles buscarán arrancar con autoridad ante una selección que disputa su primera Copa Mundial de la FIFA.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: El Post Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Tras los partidos, toca el análisis. Este espacio desmenuza lo ocurrido sobre el terreno de juego en los encuentros del Mundial y aporta imágenes inéditas. Los protagonistas del encuentro también ofrecen su punto de vista.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Maradona: The Fall
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: En el Mundial de 1994, saltó el escándalo. Diego Maradona, icono del fútbol, dio positivo en un control antidoping y fue expulsado de la selección argentina. Este trabajo documental repasa el momento más duro en la carrera futbolística del astro de Lanús.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Resúmenes Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los encuentros del Mundial 2026 comprimidos en pocos minutos para no perderse nada de lo que ocurra en la cita de Estados Unidos, México y Canadá.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Green Lions
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Cuando Camerún derrotó a la actual campeona del mundo, Argentina, en el partido inaugural de Italia '90, fue, posiblemente, la mayor sorpresa de la historia de los Mundiales. Pero eso fue sólo el principio.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Corea del Sur-Chequia
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Mundial más grande de la historia ya está aquí. La gran cita de selecciones de la FIFA cuenta por primera vez con 48 equipos en busca de la gloria. Estados Unidos, México y Canadá se convierten en el epicentro del planeta fútbol del 11 de junio al 19 de julio.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: El Fenómeno
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Fenómeno era el niño prodigio que lo tenía todo. Campeón del Mundo a los 17 años. Mejor jugador del año a los 20. Dos veces récord mundial de un traspaso a los 21. Impresionantes goles allá donde jugó. Y entonces, todo le fue brutalmente arrebatado.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Corea del Sur-Chequia
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Mundial más grande de la historia ya está aquí. La gran cita de selecciones de la FIFA cuenta por primera vez con 48 equipos en busca de la gloria. Estados Unidos, México y Canadá se convierten en el epicentro del planeta fútbol del 11 de junio al 19 de julio.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Buenos días América
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Durante el Mundial, este espacio toma el pulso a todo lo acontecido en Norteamérica en la gran cita de Selecciones del año. Las mejores imágenes de los partidos y el análisis para empezar el día informado de lo que ha acontecido durante la madrugada.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Stories From The Cities
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Un espacio que recorre las ciudades sede de Estados Unidos, México y Canadá. En lugar de enfocarse únicamente en los estadios, el show explora la cultura local, la gastronomía, la música, la gente y el arraigo del fútbol base (fútbol comunitario) en cada una de ellas.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: México-Sudáfrica
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Mundial más grande de la historia ya está aquí. La gran cita de selecciones de la FIFA cuenta por primera vez con 48 equipos en busca de la gloria. Estados Unidos, México y Canadá se convierten en el epicentro del planeta fútbol del 11 de junio al 19 de julio.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Dazoneta Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El equipo de La Dazoneta se pone en modo Mundial. Un análisis de todo lo que acontezca en la gran cita del verano, la Copa Mundial de la FIFA.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Revelado - Lopetegui
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Julen Lopetegui se sincera en Revelado, un espacio de DAZN en el que conocemos el lado más personal de los protagonistas.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Once cromos
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Un repaso a los mejores equipos y jugadores que estarán presentes en el Mundial de 2026.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Armando la Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Armando la Mundial.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Trending Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: El Mundial es tendencia. La gran cita de selecciones de la FIFA es, sin duda, el torneo global más seguido del planeta y, por tanto, deja momentos muy comentados.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Resúmenes Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los encuentros del Mundial 2026 comprimidos en pocos minutos para no perderse nada de lo que ocurra en la cita de Estados Unidos, México y Canadá.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Resúmenes Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Los encuentros del Mundial 2026 comprimidos en pocos minutos para no perderse nada de lo que ocurra en la cita de Estados Unidos, México y Canadá.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Mundial 1990
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.subtitle: Argentina-RFA
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Maradona quiere llevar a Argentina hacia su segundo título Mundial consecutivo. El astro de la albiceleste centra las miradas en la reedición de la final de 1986. Alemania Occidental, con la lección aprendida, intentará dejar la copa en Europa.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Revelado - Rodri
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: Rodrigo Hernández se sincera en Revelado, un espacio de DAZN en el que conocemos el lado más personal de los protagonistas.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: DAZN Mundial
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: La extensa cobertura de DAZN en el Mundial cuenta con una prolongada previa sobre lo que va a ocurrir durante la jornada. El canal cuenta con periodistas desplazados hasta Norteamérica para acercar al espectador a todo lo que ocurre durante la Copa del Mundo.

LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.title: Maradona: The Fall
LALIGA.TV.BAR.es.description: En el Mundial de 1994, saltó el escándalo. Diego Maradona, icono del fútbol, dio positivo en un control antidoping y fue expulsado de la selección argentina. Este trabajo documental repasa el momento más duro en la carrera futbolística del astro de Lanús.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA VS
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Jesús Gallego, Alicia Espinosa y José Luis Guzmán
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: LALIGA VS es una plataforma de LALIGA cuya misión es erradicar el odio tanto dentro fuera de los estadios, visibilizando y condenando todas aquellas conductas que no tienen cabida en el fútbol. Este podcast trae charlas entre referentes del mundo del fútbol y de otros sectores para hablar del odio en los estadios, empezando por el racismo, con personajes que cuentan sus historias en primera persona.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Previa Segunda División
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Final playoff ida. Málaga - Almería
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Toda la información previa a los partidos que se van a disputar en la siguiente jornada de competición. Noticias, estadísticas, análisis y los datos necesarios para disfrutar más de los encuentros.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Málaga - Almería
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La igualdad es la nota imperante en LaLiga HyperMotion, la Segunda División de fútbol español. Muchos son los aspirantes al ascenso, bien en busca de las dos plazas directas o por la vía del emocionante playoff con el que culmina la temporada. Sin duda, una competición con equipos de primera.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Post Segunda División
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.subtitle: Final playoff ida. Málaga - Almería
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Tras la disputa de los encuentros, es tiempo para el análisis. Los entrenadores de los equipos de LaLiga HyperMotion desmenuzan las claves que, según ellos, han propiciado el resultado del partido que acaban de jugar.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: Inside - El gran derbi
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: Un recorrido por la organización de El Gran Derbi de Sevilla y el impacto de la piratería audiovisual.

LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.title: LALIGA HYPERMOTION: Málaga - Las Palmas
LALIGA.TV.HYPERMOTION.es.description: La igualdad es la nota imperante en LaLiga HyperMotion, la Segunda División de fútbol español. Muchos son los aspirantes al ascenso, bien en busca de las dos plazas directas o por la vía del emocionante playoff con el que culmina la campaña. Una competición de primera.

Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.title: Het finale duel: Ronaldo vs Messi
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.description: In deze documentaire de twee genieën die voorbestemd waren om een tijdperk te bepalen, botsten op hetzelfde podium. Deze documentaire onderzoekt de oorsprong van de rivaliteit tussen Cristiano Ronaldo en Lionel Messi, het moment waarop hun confrontatie het Spaanse voetbal veranderde en grootsheid in het moderne voetbal voorgoed herdefinieerde.

Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.title: Wes & Raf
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.subtitle: Over het WK 2026
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.description: Het WK 2026 is eindelijk begonnen! In de laatste aflevering van het seizoen bespreken Wes & Raf met Wytse van der Goot de tegenstanders en kansen van Oranje, de titelfavorieten en blikken de mannen uiteraard ook terug op hun eigen ervaringen.

Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.title: KICK 't MET
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.subtitle: Interview: Kenneth Taylor
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.description: Kenneth Taylor blikt openhartig terug op zijn overstap van zijn vertrouwde 'warm bad' bij Ajax naar Serie A-topclub Lazio Roma. Hij bespreekt de tactische cultuurschok in Italië, het uiteenvallen van zijn Amsterdamse vriendengroep en de waardevolle lessen die hij meekreeg van Francesco Farioli. Tot slot laat de ambitieuze middenvelder er geen misverstand over bestaan: een toekomstige terugkeer naar zijn grote liefde Ajax sluit hij absoluut niet uit.

Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.title: KICK 't MET
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.subtitle: Interview: Tijjani Noslin
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.description: Tijjani Noslin deelt zijn onwaarschijnlijke levensverhaal van Subway-medewerker tot smaakmaker in de Serie A bij Lazio Roma. Hij praat openhartig over zijn moeilijke jeugd, de loodzware burn-out die hij onderweg overwon en de extreme druk van de kritische Italiaanse achterban. Tot slot legt de vastberaden aanvaller uit waarom hij zijn droom voor het Nederlands elftal nog niet opgeeft en hoe een emotioneel advies van zijn moeder hem deed besluiten om te blijven wachten op Oranje.

Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.title: KICK 't MET
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.subtitle: Interview: Kenneth Taylor
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.description: Kenneth Taylor blikt openhartig terug op zijn overstap van zijn vertrouwde 'warm bad' bij Ajax naar Serie A-topclub Lazio Roma. Hij bespreekt de tactische cultuurschok in Italië, het uiteenvallen van zijn Amsterdamse vriendengroep en de waardevolle lessen die hij meekreeg van Francesco Farioli. Tot slot laat de ambitieuze middenvelder er geen misverstand over bestaan: een toekomstige terugkeer naar zijn grote liefde Ajax sluit hij absoluut niet uit.

Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.title: KICK 't MET
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.subtitle: Interview: Sam Beukema
Ziggo.Sport.2.nl.description: Sam Beukema schuift aan in zijn vertrouwde Deventer. De verdediger van Napoli praat openhartig over de enorme cultuurshock en de intense druk van het spelen in de stad van Diego Maradona. Hij deelt hoe het is om zijn vader als zaakwaarnemer te hebben, blikt terug op zijn legendarische lunch met Ruud Krol én legt uit wat het verdedigen in de Serie A nu echt een vak apart maakt. Tot slot reageert de nuchtere Overijsselaar eerlijk op het mislopen van het WK.

Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.title: Hall of Fame dinner
Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.description: Voor het eerst schuiven zeven MotoGP Hall of Fame-leden samen aan tafel. Giacomo Agostini, Valentino Rossi, Jorge Lorenzo, Casey Stoner, Freddie Spencer, Kevin Schwantz en Dani Pedrosa, samen goed voor 23 wereldtitels in de koningsklasse, komen samen voor een besloten diner met enkele van de grootste namen uit de geschiedenis van de sport. En wanneer deze iconen beginnen te praten, is dat goud waard.

Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.title: Jorge Martin: From Heaven to Hell
Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.description: De uitdrukking 'Jorge Martin: Van de hemel naar de hel' verwijst naar twee verschillende, contrasterende periodes voor de coureur. Letterlijker kan het verwijzen naar een dramatische verschuiving in zijn carrière: zijn hemel was het winnen van het MotoGP-kampioenschap van 2024, terwijl zijn hel een blessure werd die hem dwong de laatste races van het seizoen 2025, die hij met nummer 1 zou hebben gereden, te missen.

Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.title: Alex Rins - Unstoppable
Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.subtitle: Chapter 1
Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.description: Een blessure kan niet alleen het einde van de carrière van een atleet betekenen, maar ook veel werk. Alex Rins doet verslag van verschillende levens - Het is een vierdelige documentaire waarin atleten worden geïnterviewd.

Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.title: Alex Rins - Unstoppable
Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.subtitle: Chapter 2
Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.description: Alex is hard gevallen. Midden in Mugello valt hij en nu moet hij zich een weg terug naar het leven vechten. Hij droomt van het grote circuit, het gejuich en zijn oude carrière. Nu nadert de grote dag langzaamaan.

Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.title: Alex Rins - Unstoppable
Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.subtitle: Chapter 3
Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.description: Alex is dolblij met zijn grote succes. Hij zit voor het eerst weer op zijn motor.

Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.title: Alex Rins - Unstoppable
Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.subtitle: Chapter 4
Ziggo.Sport.3.nl.description: Alex heeft zich een weg terug in het leven gevochten. Na vier afleveringen en zijn machtige crash is hij nu weer terug aan de top. Hij zit op zijn motor en wil de bochten nemen. De grote Aziatische tour komt eraan.

Ziggo.Sport.nl.title: UEFA Champions League: Bepalende momenten
Ziggo.Sport.nl.description: Een blik op hoe de UEFA Champions League uitgroeide tot een van 's werelds grootste sportevenementen. Er wordt bekeken hoe de competitie vorm kreeg, welke teams in die eerste editie meededen en welke records er de afgelopen decennia zijn gevestigd.

Ziggo.Sport.nl.title: Kick 't Met On Tour
Ziggo.Sport.nl.subtitle: Wat een Europa League finale in Istanbul!
Ziggo.Sport.nl.description: In een nieuwe aflevering van Kick 't Met On Tour: de Europa League-finale in Istanbul! De seizoensafsluiter was er eentje! De Europa League-finale tussen Aston Villa en SC Freiburg. Prachtige goals, prachtige sfeer en een verdiende winnaar. Gesprekken met legendes als Marc Desailly tot de winnaars Ian Maatsen, Amadou Onana en Youri Tielemans. Een finale die we niet snel zullen vergeten.

Ziggo.Sport.nl.subtitle: Finale Feyenoord 2002
Ziggo.Sport.nl.description: Wytse van der Goot kijkt samen met Bert van Marwijk en Pierre van Hooijdonk terug op de UEFA Cup-winst van Feyenoord in 2002.

Ziggo.Sport.nl.title: KICK 't MET
Ziggo.Sport.nl.subtitle: Interview: Kenneth Taylor
Ziggo.Sport.nl.description: Kenneth Taylor blikt openhartig terug op zijn overstap van zijn vertrouwde 'warm bad' bij Ajax naar Serie A-topclub Lazio Roma. Hij bespreekt de tactische cultuurschok in Italië, het uiteenvallen van zijn Amsterdamse vriendengroep en de waardevolle lessen die hij meekreeg van Francesco Farioli. Tot slot laat de ambitieuze middenvelder er geen misverstand over bestaan: een toekomstige terugkeer naar zijn grote liefde Ajax sluit hij absoluut niet uit.
